meta.topic: Reporting what people say using nouns and adjectives

step_1_context.text: We sometimes report people's words and thoughts using a noun in the reporting clause followed by a reported clause beginning with that, a to-infinitive-, or wh-word. Most of these nouns are related to

step_2_explanation.simple_rule: We sometimes report people's words and thoughts using a noun in the reporting clause followed by a reported clause beginning with that, a to-infinitive-, or wh-word.
step_2_explanation.common_mistake: Pay attention to the context when choosing the correct form.

step_3_interactive_exercises.question: 38.1.1 The turning point in his life came when he took the ___ (become - actor)
options: decision to become an actor / that he would become an actor
step_3_interactive_exercises.correct_answer: decision to become an actor / that he would become an actor
step_3_interactive_exercises.explanation_for_failure: Use a to-infinitive or that-clause after 'decision'.

step_3_interactive_exercises.question: 38.1.2 He failed to address the ___ (who - pay - repairs - building)
options: issue of who pays for repairs to the building
issue who will pay for repairs to the building
step_3_interactive_exercises.correct_answer: issue who will pay for repairs to the building

step_3_interactive_exercises.question: 38.1.3 I was delighted to get an ___ (spend the holidays - them - Scotland)
options: invitation to spend the holidays with them in Scotland
invitation that I spend the holidays
step_3_interactive_exercises.correct_answer: invitation to spend the holidays with them in Scotland

step_3_interactive_exercises.question: 38.2.1 At the end the writers suggest when it is appropriate to correct students' grammar mistakes. -> The writers end with ___
options: suggestions as to when it is appropriate to correct students' grammar mistakes.
step_3_interactive_exercises.correct_answer: suggestions as to when it is appropriate to correct students' grammar mistakes.

step_3_interactive_exercises.question: 38.2.2 People have argued a great deal about how to define poverty. -> There has been ___
options: argument as to how to define poverty.
an argument about how defining poverty.
argument that how poverty is defined.
step_3_interactive_exercises.correct_answer: argument as to how to define poverty.
